zh.Montfort, Île-de-France, France: 法國i萊-德-福朗斯蒙福爾

zh.Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France: 法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也
zh.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Roye是Rogues De Roye的兒子，於大約1170年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯蒙福爾。他於1195年與Pétronille de Montfort在法國結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1237年享年68歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯哈布希。

zh-hans.Montfort, Île-de-France, France: 法国i萊-德-福朗斯蒙福爾
zh-hans.Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Fra: 法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯哈布希

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Roye是Rogues De Roye的儿子，于大约1170年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯蒙福爾。他于1195年与Pétronille de Montfort在法国结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1237年享年68岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯哈布希。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian Roje: from a pet form of Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘generation, family, relatives’, e.g. Rodimir.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Roj, Rój or Roja (see Roy 4).

variants.name: Roy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Normand, Andre, Jacques, Marcel, Emile, Laurent, Pierre, Cecile, Donat, Gilles.  Indian Dipak, Sumit, Amit, Ajit, Dipankar, Partha, Ranjan, Shyamal, Aloke, Amitava, Chitra, Gautam.
Scottish: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Gaelic ruadh ‘red’. Compare Reed .
English (of Norman origin): from Old French roi ‘king’, used as a nickname (see 3 below) and also as a personal name. Compare Ray 2.

nameMeanings.name: Barthélémy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bartholomew
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

en.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Roye was born about 1170, in Montfort, Île-de-France, France as the son of Rogues De Roye. He married Pétronille de Montfort in 1195, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1237, at the age of 68, and was buried in Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Roye est né environ 1170, à Montfort, Île-de-France, France, fils de Rogues De Roye. Il a épousé Pétronille de Montfort en 1195, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1237, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Roye wurde um 1170 in Montfort, Île-de-France, Frankreich, als Sohn von Rogues De Roye geboren. Er hat 1195 in Frankreich Pétronille de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1237 im Alter von 68 Jahren und wurde in Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Roye è nato il circa 1170 nel Montfort, Île-de-France, Francia come figlio di Rogues De Roye. Lui sposato Pétronille de Montfort nel 1195, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1237, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Royeは約1170年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスモントフォートでRogues De Royeの息子として生まれた。1195年にフランスでPétronille de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1237年に68歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスチャンボウルシにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Roye(은)는 대략 1170년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 몽포트에서 Rogues De Roye의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1195년 프랑스에서 Pétronille de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1237년 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 챔보우르시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Roye nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Montfort, Île-de-France, França filho de Rogues De Roye. Ele casou-se com Pétronille de Montfort em 1195, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1237, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Roye родился около 1170 г. в местности монтфорт, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Его отца звали Rogues De Roye. Он женился на женщине по имени Pétronille de Montfort в 1195 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1237 г. в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности чамбурси, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Barthélémy de Roye nació aproximadamente 1170, en Montfort, Île-de-France, Francia como hijo de Rogues De Roye. Se casó con Pétronille de Montfort en 1195, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1237, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Chambourcy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.
